visual_description: A medium shot captures a group of people gathered around a gurney in what appears to be a morgue or a medical examination room. In the foreground, a woman with her back to the camera, wearing a maroon top, stands beside the gurney. On the gurney lies a body covered by a patterned blanket. To her left, a man in a white shirt and dark tie, wearing glasses, leans over the body, looking down intently. Behind him, another man in a dark suit and tie stands observing. The room has plain, light-colored walls and a wooden door in the background. The camera slowly zooms in, tightening the frame on the group. A fourth person, a man in a light-colored shirt, enters the frame from the right and leans over the gurney, appearing to examine the body as well. The man in the white shirt and tie continues to look down, while the man in the suit gestures with his hand as if explaining something. The camera remains steady, focusing on the interaction and examination of the body on the gurney. A man speaks in a calm, professional, and clinical tone, as if he is a medical examiner or pathologist explaining a procedure. His voice is steady and matter
